settings.heading: Active Ingredients
settings.subheading: Discover why our products are leaders in their categories, developed in collaboration with experts, dermatologically tested and backed by real results.

settings.heading: How does it work?
settings.subheading: Simple steps to get the most out of your product.

settings.subtitle: From Dubai to Amsterdam, our satisfied customers share their experiences

settings.title: Clean Brand
settings.description:
During the development of our products, we envisioned and created a brand that is nature-friendly, not tested on animals, and free of animal-derived ingredients.

We say No! — no parabens, alcohol, artificial fragrances or dyes. ❤️

settings.title: Less is More
settings.description: With few but carefully selected ingredients, we have combined simple, clear and effective formulas, without unnecessary complications, for skincare that delivers visible results.

settings.title: Effective Formulation
settings.description:
We don't make empty promises — we create formulas that deliver results.
We know well that an effective formulation is more valuable than the composition alone.
That's why we carefully combine active ingredients with the right pH and stability, providing you with products that truly work.

settings.title: We Share!
settings.description:
We share goodness!
We love to help, and with every purchase you become part of our mission — a portion of the proceeds from every product goes to charitable causes for children and animals.

settings.title: Skincare Expert
settings.description:
We want you to become an expert on your own skin with information from our website, Instagram page and consultations with our specialists.
That's exactly what we work for — to help you truly understand your skin.

settings.title: Our Values
settings.subtitle: Learn more about how we care for nature and your skin
